news.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
news.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

news.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more

news.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
